content:
# Task Management REST API

RESTful API design for a task management system with authentication, CRUD operations, and assignment support.

## Endpoints

| Method | Path | Description | Auth required |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/api/tasks` | List tasks (supports filter/sort/pagination) | Yes |
| `POST` | `/api/tasks` | Create a new task | Yes |
| `GET` | `/api/tasks/:id` | Get task by ID | Yes |
| `PATCH` | `/api/tasks/:id` | Update task fields | Yes (owner or admin) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/tasks/:id` | Delete a task | Yes (owner or admin) |
| `POST` | `/api/tasks/:id/assign` | Assign task to a user | Yes (admin) |
| `GET` | `/api/users/:id/tasks` | List tasks assigned to a user | Yes |

## Create Task

**Request**

```json
POST /api/tasks
Authorization: Bearer <token>
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "title": "Implement registration renewal flow",
  "description": "Build the eligibility check and payment integration",
  "priority": "high",
  "dueAt": "2025-08-15T00:00:00Z",
  "assigneeId": "usr_01j2k3m4n5"
}
```

**Response**

```json
201 Created

{
  "id": "tsk_01j8p9q0r1",
  "title": "Implement registration renewal flow",
  "description": "Build the eligibility check and payment integration",
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "todo",
  "dueAt": "2025-08-15T00:00:00Z",
  "assigneeId": "usr_01j2k3m4n5",
  "createdBy": "usr_01j0a1b2c3",
  "createdAt": "2025-07-01T09:22:14Z",
  "updatedAt": "2025-07-01T09:22:14Z"
}
```

## Create Task тАФ Sequence Diagram

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    actor Client
    participant API
    participant Auth
    participant DB
    participant EventBus

    Client->>API: POST /api/tasks {title, priority, assigneeId}
    API->>Auth: Validate Bearer token
    Auth-->>API: User context {id, role}
    API->>API: Validate request body (Valibot/Zod)
    API->>DB: INSERT task record
    DB-->>API: Task row with generated id
    API->>EventBus: Publish task.created event
    EventBus-->>API: Ack
    API->>Client: 201 Created {task}
```

## Error Responses

```json
422 Unprocessable Entity

{
  "error": "VALIDATION_ERROR",
  "message": "Request body is invalid",
  "details": [
    { "field": "title", "message": "Required" },
    { "field": "priority", "message": "Must be one of: low, medium, high, critical" }
  ]
}
```
